goal: Replace Spring Authorization Server with direct JWT issuance — create JwtService, update SecurityConfig, remove AuthorizationServerConfig and OAuth2 auth server dependency.

tasks.name: Create JwtService with RSA key loading and JWT generation
tasks.action: Create JwtService @Service that loads RSA keys from config (port logic from AuthorizationServerConfig), initializes NimbusJwtEncoder/NimbusJwtDecoder, provides generateAccessToken(UserAccount), generateRefreshToken(), decodeToken(String) methods. Access token includes sub, userId, email, roles, authorities claims with 1h expiry.

tasks.name: Update SecurityConfig with PasswordEncoder, JwtDecoder, JSON errors
tasks.action: Add PasswordEncoder (BCrypt) and JwtDecoder beans to SecurityConfig. Remove formLogin. Add /api/auth/login and /api/auth/refresh to permitAll. Add custom AuthenticationEntryPoint and AccessDeniedHandler returning JSON responses.

tasks.name: Delete AuthorizationServerConfig, JwtTokenCustomizer, remove OAuth2 auth server dep
tasks.action: Delete AuthorizationServerConfig.java and JwtTokenCustomizer.java. Remove spring-security-oauth2-authorization-server dependency from pom.xml. Keep spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server.
verify: cd /Users/arnoldkizzitoh/Documents/haha/innercircle-sacco && mvn -pl sacco-security -am compile -q && mvn -pl sacco-security test -q

planVerify: cd /Users/arnoldkizzitoh/Documents/haha/innercircle-sacco && mvn -pl sacco-security -am compile -q && mvn -pl sacco-security test -q
commitMessage: feat(custom-auth-api): replace Spring Authorization Server with direct JWT via JwtService
